---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/atun_anggara
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/atunanggara/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/atunanggara

---

I got interested in data science after receiving my Ph.D. in the [computational chemical engineering catalysis area](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PyTERHUAAAAJ&hl=en) and did my post-doc in the First Year of Studies program at the [University of Notre Dame](https://www.nd.edu).

My post-doc experience provided me the opportunity to work with various data science techniques. Sentiment analysis, n-gram analysis, and topic modeling were some of the techniques that I have performed on various textual data, including students' reflection and survey results. Creating statistical summaries and [Tableau dashboards](https://www.tableau.com/) for various stakeholders in the university have also been a part of my experience.

Currently, I am continuing to level up my data science skills. That includes being a part of the [deep learning study group in the community](https://www.meetup.com/Twin-Cities-Deep-Learning-Study-Group/events/).
